calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition By Attorney-In-Fact For Authority To Create A Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar May-12-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

Mr. Der stated that he was not aware that the Court was expecting Mr. White to be here, and informed the Court as to Mr. White's medical condition. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR#5520. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy B. Bloom.
